members.name: AreAllChildCollisionsEnabled
members.signature: public bool AreAllChildCollisionsEnabled(int index)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if all child [SpringBoneCollision3D]s are contained in the collision list at [param index] in the settings.

members.name: ClearCollisions
members.signature: public void ClearCollisions(int index)
members.summary: Clears all collisions from the collision list at [param index] in the settings when [method are_all_child_collisions_enabled] is [code]false[/code].

members.name: ClearExcludeCollisions
members.signature: public void ClearExcludeCollisions(int index)
members.summary: Clears all exclude collisions from the collision list at [param index] in the settings when [method are_all_child_collisions_enabled] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: ClearSettings
members.signature: public void ClearSettings()
members.summary: Clears all settings.

members.name: GetCenterBone
members.signature: public int GetCenterBone(int index)
members.summary: Returns the center bone index of the bone chain.

members.name: GetCenterBoneName
members.signature: public String GetCenterBoneName(int index)
members.summary: Returns the center bone name of the bone chain.

members.name: GetCenterFrom
members.signature: public int GetCenterFrom(int index)
members.summary: Returns what the center originates from in the bone chain.

members.name: GetCenterNode
members.signature: public NodePath GetCenterNode(int index)
members.summary: Returns the center node path of the bone chain.

members.name: GetCollisionCount
members.signature: public int GetCollisionCount(int index)
members.summary: Returns the collision count of the bone chain's collision list when [method are_all_child_collisions_enabled] is [code]false[/code].

members.name: GetCollisionPath
members.signature: public NodePath GetCollisionPath(int index, int collision)
members.summary: Returns the node path of the [SpringBoneCollision3D] at [param collision] in the bone chain's collision list when [method are_all_child_collisions_enabled] is [code]false[/code].

members.name: GetDrag
members.signature: public float GetDrag(int index)
members.summary: Returns the drag force damping curve of the bone chain.

members.name: GetDragDampingCurve
members.signature: public Curve GetDragDampingCurve(int index)
members.summary: Returns the drag force damping curve of the bone chain.

members.name: GetEndBone
members.signature: public int GetEndBone(int index)
members.summary: Returns the end bone index of the bone chain.

members.name: GetEndBoneDirection
members.signature: public int GetEndBoneDirection(int index)
members.summary: Returns the tail direction of the end bone of the bone chain when [method is_end_bone_extended] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: GetEndBoneLength
members.signature: public float GetEndBoneLength(int index)
members.summary: Returns the end bone tail length of the bone chain when [method is_end_bone_extended] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: GetEndBoneName
members.signature: public String GetEndBoneName(int index)
members.summary: Returns the end bone name of the bone chain.

members.name: GetExcludeCollisionCount
members.signature: public int GetExcludeCollisionCount(int index)
members.summary: Returns the exclude collision count of the bone chain's exclude collision list when [method are_all_child_collisions_enabled] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: GetExcludeCollisionPath
members.signature: public NodePath GetExcludeCollisionPath(int index, int collision)
members.summary: Returns the node path of the [SpringBoneCollision3D] at [param collision] in the bone chain's exclude collision list when [method are_all_child_collisions_enabled] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: GetGravity
members.signature: public float GetGravity(int index)
members.summary: Returns the gravity amount of the bone chain.

members.name: GetGravityDampingCurve
members.signature: public Curve GetGravityDampingCurve(int index)
members.summary: Returns the gravity amount damping curve of the bone chain.

members.name: GetGravityDirection
members.signature: public Vector3 GetGravityDirection(int index)
members.summary: Returns the gravity direction of the bone chain.

members.name: GetJointBone
members.signature: public int GetJointBone(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the bone index at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointBoneName
members.signature: public String GetJointBoneName(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the bone name at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointCount
members.signature: public int GetJointCount(int index)
members.summary: Returns the joint count of the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointDrag
members.signature: public float GetJointDrag(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the drag force at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointGravity
members.signature: public float GetJointGravity(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the gravity amount at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointGravityDirection
members.signature: public Vector3 GetJointGravityDirection(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the gravity direction at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointRadius
members.signature: public float GetJointRadius(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the radius at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointRotationAxis
members.signature: public int GetJointRotationAxis(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the rotation axis at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetJointRotationAxisVector
members.signature: public Vector3 GetJointRotationAxisVector(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the rotation axis vector for the specified joint in the bone chain. This vector represents the axis around which the joint can rotate. It is determined based on the rotation axis set for the joint. If [method get_joint_rotation_axis] is [constant SkeletonModifier3D.ROTATION_AXIS_ALL], this method returns [code]Vector3(0, 0, 0)[/code].

members.name: GetJointStiffness
members.signature: public float GetJointStiffness(int index, int joint)
members.summary: Returns the stiffness force at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list.

members.name: GetRadius
members.signature: public float GetRadius(int index)
members.summary: Returns the joint radius of the bone chain.

members.name: GetRadiusDampingCurve
members.signature: public Curve GetRadiusDampingCurve(int index)
members.summary: Returns the joint radius damping curve of the bone chain.

members.name: GetRootBone
members.signature: public int GetRootBone(int index)
members.summary: Returns the root bone index of the bone chain.

members.name: GetRootBoneName
members.signature: public String GetRootBoneName(int index)
members.summary: Returns the root bone name of the bone chain.

members.name: GetRotationAxis
members.signature: public int GetRotationAxis(int index)
members.summary: Returns the rotation axis of the bone chain.

members.name: GetRotationAxisVector
members.signature: public Vector3 GetRotationAxisVector(int index)
members.summary: Returns the rotation axis vector of the bone chain. This vector represents the axis around which the bone chain can rotate. It is determined based on the rotation axis set for the bone chain. If [method get_rotation_axis] is [constant SkeletonModifier3D.ROTATION_AXIS_ALL], this method returns [code]Vector3(0, 0, 0)[/code].

members.name: GetStiffness
members.signature: public float GetStiffness(int index)
members.summary: Returns the stiffness force of the bone chain.

members.name: GetStiffnessDampingCurve
members.signature: public Curve GetStiffnessDampingCurve(int index)
members.summary: Returns the stiffness force damping curve of the bone chain.

members.name: IsConfigIndividual
members.signature: public bool IsConfigIndividual(int index)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the config can be edited individually for each joint.

members.name: IsEndBoneExtended
members.signature: public bool IsEndBoneExtended(int index)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the end bone is extended to have a tail.

members.name: Reset
members.signature: public void Reset()
members.summary: Resets a simulating state with respect to the current bone pose. It is useful to prevent the simulation result getting violent. For example, calling this immediately after a call to [method AnimationPlayer.play] without a fading, or within the previous [signal SkeletonModifier3D.modification_processed] signal if it's condition changes significantly.

members.name: SetCenterBone
members.signature: public void SetCenterBone(int index, int bone)
members.summary: Sets the center bone index of the bone chain.

members.name: SetCenterBoneName
members.signature: public void SetCenterBoneName(int index, String boneName)
members.summary: Sets the center bone name of the bone chain.

members.name: SetCenterFrom
members.signature: public void SetCenterFrom(int index, int centerFrom)
members.summary: Sets what the center originates from in the bone chain. Bone movement is calculated based on the difference in relative distance between center and bone in the previous and next frames. For example, if the parent [Skeleton3D] is used as the center, the bones are considered to have not moved if the [Skeleton3D] moves in the world. In this case, only a change in the bone pose is considered to be a bone movement.

members.name: SetCenterNode
members.signature: public void SetCenterNode(int index, NodePath nodePath)
members.summary: Sets the center node path of the bone chain.

members.name: SetCollisionCount
members.signature: public void SetCollisionCount(int index, int count)
members.summary: Sets the number of collisions in the collision list at [param index] in the settings when [method are_all_child_collisions_enabled] is [code]false[/code].

members.name: SetCollisionPath
members.signature: public void SetCollisionPath(int index, int collision, NodePath nodePath)
members.summary: Sets the node path of the [SpringBoneCollision3D] at [param collision] in the bone chain's collision list when [method are_all_child_collisions_enabled] is [code]false[/code].

members.name: SetDrag
members.signature: public void SetDrag(int index, float drag)
members.summary: Sets the drag force of the bone chain. The greater the value, the more suppressed the wiggling. The value is scaled by [method set_drag_damping_curve] and cached in each joint setting in the joint list.

members.name: SetDragDampingCurve
members.signature: public void SetDragDampingCurve(int index, Curve curve)
members.summary: Sets the drag force damping curve of the bone chain.

members.name: SetEnableAllChildCollisions
members.signature: public void SetEnableAllChildCollisions(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If [param enabled] is [code]true[/code], all child [SpringBoneCollision3D]s are colliding and [method set_exclude_collision_path] is enabled as an exclusion list at [param index] in the settings. If [param enabled] is [code]false[/code], you need to manually register all valid collisions with [method set_collision_path].

members.name: SetEndBone
members.signature: public void SetEndBone(int index, int bone)
members.summary: Sets the end bone index of the bone chain.

members.name: SetEndBoneDirection
members.signature: public void SetEndBoneDirection(int index, int boneDirection)
members.summary: Sets the end bone tail direction of the bone chain when [method is_end_bone_extended] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SetEndBoneLength
members.signature: public void SetEndBoneLength(int index, float length)
members.summary: Sets the end bone tail length of the bone chain when [method is_end_bone_extended] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SetEndBoneName
members.signature: public void SetEndBoneName(int index, String boneName)
members.summary: Sets the end bone name of the bone chain. [b]Note:[/b] End bone must be the root bone or a child of the root bone. If they are the same, the tail must be extended by [method set_extend_end_bone] to jiggle the bone.

members.name: SetExcludeCollisionCount
members.signature: public void SetExcludeCollisionCount(int index, int count)
members.summary: Sets the number of exclude collisions in the exclude collision list at [param index] in the settings when [method are_all_child_collisions_enabled] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SetExcludeCollisionPath
members.signature: public void SetExcludeCollisionPath(int index, int collision, NodePath nodePath)
members.summary: Sets the node path of the [SpringBoneCollision3D] at [param collision] in the bone chain's exclude collision list when [method are_all_child_collisions_enabled] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SetExtendEndBone
members.signature: public void SetExtendEndBone(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If [param enabled] is [code]true[/code], the end bone is extended to have a tail. The extended tail config is allocated to the last element in the joint list. In other words, if you set [param enabled] to [code]false[/code], the config of the last element in the joint list has no effect in the simulated result.

members.name: SetGravity
members.signature: public void SetGravity(int index, float gravity)
members.summary: Sets the gravity amount of the bone chain. This value is not an acceleration, but a constant velocity of movement in [method set_gravity_direction]. If [param gravity] is not [code]0[/code], the modified pose will not return to the original pose since it is always affected by gravity. The value is scaled by [method set_gravity_damping_curve] and cached in each joint setting in the joint list.

members.name: SetGravityDampingCurve
members.signature: public void SetGravityDampingCurve(int index, Curve curve)
members.summary: Sets the gravity amount damping curve of the bone chain.

members.name: SetGravityDirection
members.signature: public void SetGravityDirection(int index, Vector3 gravityDirection)
members.summary: Sets the gravity direction of the bone chain. This value is internally normalized and then multiplied by [method set_gravity]. The value is cached in each joint setting in the joint list.

members.name: SetIndividualConfig
members.signature: public void SetIndividualConfig(int index, bool enabled)
members.summary: If [param enabled] is [code]true[/code], the config can be edited individually for each joint.

members.name: SetJointDrag
members.signature: public void SetJointDrag(int index, int joint, float drag)
members.summary: Sets the drag force at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list when [method is_config_individual] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SetJointGravity
members.signature: public void SetJointGravity(int index, int joint, float gravity)
members.summary: Sets the gravity amount at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list when [method is_config_individual] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SetJointGravityDirection
members.signature: public void SetJointGravityDirection(int index, int joint, Vector3 gravityDirection)
members.summary: Sets the gravity direction at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list when [method is_config_individual] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SetJointRadius
members.signature: public void SetJointRadius(int index, int joint, float radius)
members.summary: Sets the joint radius at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list when [method is_config_individual] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SetJointRotationAxis
members.signature: public void SetJointRotationAxis(int index, int joint, int axis)
members.summary: Sets the rotation axis at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list when [method is_config_individual] is [code]true[/code]. The axes are based on the reference pose's space, if [param axis] is [constant SkeletonModifier3D.ROTATION_AXIS_CUSTOM], you can specify any axis. In here, the reference pose is the bone pose immediately before the simulation. [b]Note:[/b] The rotation axis and the forward vector shouldn't be colinear to avoid unintended rotation since [SpringBoneSimulator3D] does not factor in twisting forces.

members.name: SetJointRotationAxisVector
members.signature: public void SetJointRotationAxisVector(int index, int joint, Vector3 vector)
members.summary: Sets the rotation axis vector for the specified joint in the bone chain. This vector is normalized by an internal process and represents the axis around which the bone chain can rotate. If the vector length is [code]0[/code], it is considered synonymous with [constant SkeletonModifier3D.ROTATION_AXIS_ALL].

members.name: SetJointStiffness
members.signature: public void SetJointStiffness(int index, int joint, float stiffness)
members.summary: Sets the stiffness force at [param joint] in the bone chain's joint list when [method is_config_individual] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SetRadius
members.signature: public void SetRadius(int index, float radius)
members.summary: Sets the joint radius of the bone chain. It is used to move and slide with the [SpringBoneCollision3D] in the collision list. The value is scaled by [method set_radius_damping_curve] and cached in each joint setting in the joint list.

members.name: SetRadiusDampingCurve
members.signature: public void SetRadiusDampingCurve(int index, Curve curve)
members.summary: Sets the joint radius damping curve of the bone chain.

members.name: SetRootBone
members.signature: public void SetRootBone(int index, int bone)
members.summary: Sets the root bone index of the bone chain.

members.name: SetRootBoneName
members.signature: public void SetRootBoneName(int index, String boneName)
members.summary: Sets the root bone name of the bone chain.

members.name: SetRotationAxis
members.signature: public void SetRotationAxis(int index, int axis)
members.summary: Sets the rotation axis of the bone chain. If set to a specific axis, it acts like a hinge joint. The value is cached in each joint setting in the joint list. The axes are based on the reference pose's space, if [param axis] is [constant SkeletonModifier3D.ROTATION_AXIS_CUSTOM], you can specify any axis. In here, the reference pose is the bone pose immediately before the simulation. [b]Note:[/b] The rotation axis vector and the forward vector shouldn't be colinear to avoid unintended rotation since [SpringBoneSimulator3D] does not factor in twisting forces.

members.name: SetRotationAxisVector
members.signature: public void SetRotationAxisVector(int index, Vector3 vector)
members.summary: Sets the rotation axis vector of the bone chain. The value is cached in each joint setting in the joint list. This vector is normalized by an internal process and represents the axis around which the bone chain can rotate. If the vector length is [code]0[/code], it is considered synonymous with [constant SkeletonModifier3D.ROTATION_AXIS_ALL].

members.name: SetStiffness
members.signature: public void SetStiffness(int index, float stiffness)
members.summary: Sets the stiffness force of the bone chain. The greater the value, the faster it recovers to its initial pose. If [param stiffness] is [code]0[/code], the modified pose will not return to the original pose. The value is scaled by [method set_stiffness_damping_curve] and cached in each joint setting in the joint list.

members.name: SetStiffnessDampingCurve
members.signature: public void SetStiffnessDampingCurve(int index, Curve curve)
members.summary: Sets the stiffness force damping curve of the bone chain.

members.name: ExternalForce
members.signature: public Vector3 ExternalForce { get; set; }
members.summary: The constant force that always affected bones. It is equal to the result when the parent [Skeleton3D] moves at this speed in the opposite direction. This is useful for effects such as wind and anti-gravity.

members.name: MutableBoneAxes
members.signature: public bool MutableBoneAxes { get; set; }
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the solver retrieves the bone axis from the bone pose every frame. If [code]false[/code], the solver retrieves the bone axis from the bone rest and caches it, which increases performance slightly, but position changes in the bone pose made before processing this [SpringBoneSimulator3D] are ignored.

members.name: SettingCount
members.signature: public int SettingCount { get; set; }
members.summary: The number of settings.

values.name: CENTER_FROM_BONE
values.summary: The bone pose origin of the parent [Skeleton3D] specified by [method set_center_bone] is defined as center. If [Node3D] is not found, the parent [Skeleton3D] is treated as center.

values.name: CENTER_FROM_NODE
values.summary: The [Node3D] specified by [method set_center_node] is defined as center. If [Node3D] is not found, the parent [Skeleton3D] is treated as center.

values.name: CENTER_FROM_WORLD_ORIGIN
values.summary: The world origin is defined as center.

constants.name: CENTER_FROM_WORLD_ORIGIN
constants.summary: The world origin is defined as center.

constants.name: CENTER_FROM_NODE
constants.summary: The [Node3D] specified by [method set_center_node] is defined as center. If [Node3D] is not found, the parent [Skeleton3D] is treated as center.

constants.name: CENTER_FROM_BONE
constants.summary: The bone pose origin of the parent [Skeleton3D] specified by [method set_center_bone] is defined as center. If [Node3D] is not found, the parent [Skeleton3D] is treated as center.
